text:
Hey there! 👋 Welcome to your GEO audit for **example.com**. 

You're looking at the **Overview** tab, which shows the big picture of your AI visibility health. Right now, your site has a **GEO Score of 60/100** and you're on the Free tier.

Here's what I can help you with:

- **📊 Understand your score** — I can explain what's affecting your 60/100 score and why
- **🔧 Fix recommendations** — Check out the Recommendations tab to see prioritized fixes that'll boost your visibility to AI agents
- **⚙️ Deploy files** — Head to the Setup tab to generate and download integration files (llms.txt, schema, etc.) for WordPress
- **📈 Track progress** — See how your score changes over time in the History tab

**What would you like to focus on?** For example:
- Want a quick breakdown of your score?
- Ready to see what's hurting your AI visibility most?
- Need help deploying changes to your WordPress site?

Just let me know! 🚀
